key_threats: 4 wins suggest a competent core — capable of putting up a fight on the day
Mid-season form could have improved beyond their early-season results
key_weaknesses: NRR of -1.01 indicates they lose heavily — batting or bowling collapses in losses

counter_strategy.how_to_bowl: Apply early pressure with Pradhan and Namit Rathi to exploit their fragile batting. Their NRR suggests they can implode quickly once wickets start falling.
counter_strategy.matchup_recommendations: Bat first, score 100+, and shut them down in the 2nd innings. Full bowling rotation — do not underestimate them.
